writing.task1:
Dear Contractor
Our neighborhood has had many noise problems from weekend construction. For example, loud work on Sept 2 at 7:15am and Sept 9 at 6:50am disturbed many families. We ask you to place noise barriers, begin after 8:30am, and give us one contact person for urgent calls. Please also share a clear work schedule in writing and an escalation process if problems return
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree that cities should stop shared e-scooters after midnight. At night people are often tired or may drink, so accidents happen more. For example, in many cities, hospitals report more scooter injuries after 11 pm. A counter-argument is that some workers need scooters to go home late, but the city can help them by giving late buses or cheaper ride-hail rides, so safety is still first while access is not lost
writing.task3: Cohort A showed good engagement but only moderate completion and limited community, Cohort B had the highest completion and forum activity though with lower active minutes, while Cohort C was most engaged but weakest in completion and community. Overall, Cohort B offered the best balance, so a useful intervention would be adding weekly reminders or short check-ins to boost engagement without harming completion, and the main KPI to monitor should be the completion rate
